hero.title: Your Personal Finance Assistant
hero.subtitle: Import your bank CSV, automatically categorize expenses, and predict your cash flow for the next 3 months — all in your browser, no data leaves your device.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Powerful finance tools that respect your privacy

csv.title: CSV Import
csv.desc: Auto-detects bank CSV formats from any country. Supports US, EU, Latin American, and Asian date and number formats.

categories.title: Smart Categorization
categories.desc: Automatically classifies your transactions into 13 categories using multi-language keyword matching.

forecast.title: Cash Flow Prediction
forecast.desc: Uses Holt-Winters exponential smoothing to forecast your income and expenses for the next 3 months with confidence intervals.

charts.title: Interactive Charts
charts.desc: Beautiful visualizations of your spending patterns, income trends, and predicted cash flow.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.desc: All data stays on your device. No servers, no accounts, no tracking. Uses IndexedDB for local storage.

pwa.title: Works Offline
pwa.desc: Install as a Progressive Web App and use it without internet. Your financial data is always accessible.

import.title: Import Your Data
import.subtitle: Drag and drop your bank CSV file
import.dropTitle: Drop CSV here or click to browse
import.dropSubtitle: Supports most bank CSV formats worldwide

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.confirmClear: Are you sure you want to clear all data? This cannot be undone.

rec.expenseRising: Your expenses are trending upward. Consider reviewing discretionary spending.
rec.lowSavings: Your savings rate is below 10%. Aim for at least 20% to build a safety net.
rec.greatSavings: Excellent savings rate! Consider investing your surplus for long-term growth.
rec.negativeFlow: Cash flow may go negative soon. Plan ahead by cutting non-essential expenses.
rec.emergencyFund: Build an emergency fund covering 3 months of expenses.

errors.noTransactions: No valid transactions found in CSV

footer.desc: Open source personal finance assistant. Your data never leaves your device.
